description: A TypeScript SDK providing a unified interface for YouTube, Twitch, and TwitCasting live streaming platform APIs.
rules: Zero runtime dependencies in @unified-live/core. Plain TypeScript types, no schema libraries, no class hierarchies.
Public API throws UnifiedLiveError subclasses with typed ErrorCode. Internal code may use Result<V, E> but Result must never appear in public return types.

Content is a discriminated union on the `type` field: 'broadcast' | 'scheduled' | 'archive' | 'clip'. Use companion-object type guards like Content.isBroadcast(x) for narrowing — never `as` assertions.
Factory functions only (discordeno pattern). All functions use arrow syntax. No `function` declarations except TypeScript overload signatures.
Plugins are installed via UnifiedClient.create({ plugins: [createYouTubePlugin(...), ...] }). Each platform is its own package.
Runs on Node 18+, Deno, Bun, and Cloudflare Workers — any runtime with native fetch.
